content: Episodic memory in neural planning agents can be dynamically pruned and prioritized via a curiosity-driven active learning loop drawn from 2024-2025 SOTA active memory agent designs, where only high-surprise, plan-relevant episodic traces are retained for long-horizon planning. This replaces fixed-size episodic memory buffers with a self-growing, self-curating storage system that aligns memory capacity with the agent’s current exploration goals.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
